Notes: UWO ranked 14th in the NCAA Div. III by D3hoops.com...UWO clinches at least a
share of its league-leading 12th WIAC title...UWO last captured the WIAC title
in 2006...UWO's highest-scoring game of the season featured a career-best 18
points from Pitt...UWO led 34-12 after one period and 58-27 at intermission.
Game.Officials: Ralph Sirmons,  Royce Ruter,  M.J. Wagenson
